testcase.name: test_compare_models_returns_results_for_all_models

failure.message:
AssertionError: Unexpected status: 502, The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 in [200, 500] + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_compare_models.py:72: in test_compare_models_returns_results_for_all_models assert response.status_code in [200, 500], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}, {response.text}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 502, The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 in [200, 500] E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
